goal: Create a compliant, high-conversion script that moves viewers from trust to consultation booking.
assumptions: Evidence-led hooks outperform hype in regulated service categories.
A restrained CTA increases trust with high-ticket local service buyers.
evidence: Radar shows stricter enforcement on exaggerated claims.
core_message: You do not need louder promises; you need proof, clarity, and a next step that feels safe.
hooks: Why do some clinics post every day but still miss high-quality bookings?
script_body: Open with a real business loss, show a proof-backed content route, then invite the viewer to book a consultation instead of chasing vague promises.
risk_phrases: avoid guarantee, avoid medical efficacy overclaim, avoid fake urgency
